title: 3D to SVG: turn a 3D model into an SVG icon | Greg Linscheid
excerpt: A web-based tool that turns a 3D model into a flat or cel-shaded SVG icon. Runs in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.
content_html:
1. Home
  2. Tools
  3. 3d To Svg

Drop a .glb, .obj, or .stl model below and pose it with the mouse or the sliders, then export it as a flat or cel-shaded SVG icon. Everything runs in your browser. Nothing gets uploaded. The preview is the exact path that gets exported, so a given model, pose, and style always produce the same bytes.

Drop a 3D model .glb, .obj, or .stl

Sample model: Spaceship Fighter by Ethan Cox (EthanfromEngland), licensed CC BY 4.0.

sentences.en: Drop a .glb, .obj, or .stl model below and pose it with the mouse or the sliders, then export it as a flat or cel-shaded SVG icon.
sentences.zh: 将 .glb、.obj 或 .stl 模型拖放到下面，并使用鼠标或滑块对其进行姿势调整，然后将其导出为平面或卡通着色的 SVG 图标。
一切都在您的浏览器中运行。

sentences.en: The preview is the exact path that gets exported, so a given model, pose, and style always produce the same bytes.
sentences.zh: 预览是导出的确切路径，因此给定的模型、姿势和样式始终生成相同的字节。

sentences.en: Sample model: Spaceship Fighter by Ethan Cox (EthanfromEngland), licensed CC BY 4.0.

content_html_zh:
1. Home
  2. Tools
  3. 3d 转 Svg

将 .glb、.obj 或 .stl 模型拖放到下面，并使用鼠标或滑块对其进行姿势调整，然后将其导出为平面或卡通着色的 SVG 图标。 一切都在您的浏览器中运行。 什么都没有上传。 预览是导出的确切路径，因此给定的模型、姿势和样式始终生成相同的字节。

删除 3D 模型 .glb、.obj 或 .stl

示例模型：Ethan Cox (EthanfromEngland) 的 Spaceship Fighter，已获得 CC BY 4.0 许可。
